title: Protect local financial data
description: Ledger stores, backups, temporary candidates, logs, diagnostics, and non-data-return output must preserve the accepted sole-owner local trust boundary without custom cryptography; explicit requested data results remain permitted.
target: 100% of created financial artifacts have owner-only host access; zero diagnostics, logs, or non-data-return outputs contain credentials, unmasked account identifiers, transaction descriptions, or serialized financial payloads; the selected maintained at-rest protection passes OQ-LEDGER-8 before planning.
load_condition: Normal operation, errors, backup, restore, upgrade, migration, and skill invocation on each supported host.
measurement: Permission inspection, secret and payload canary scans, negative-path tests, and the required storage security spike.
rationale: Personal financial history is sensitive even though the present household-only use is outside application auth, tenancy, and hosted compliance scope. Supports G1, G5, and G8.
